memoryArtifacts.headline: Biography of Sir Dunning de LATHOM 1031 - 1092.
memoryArtifacts.description:
The first to bear the Latham surname was a Saxon traitor named Dunning, living in Lancashire about the time of the Norman conquest in 1066 A.D.

Because of his collaboration with the Normans and betra …

popularStory.headline: Dunning de Latham
popularStory.description:
Sir Dunning de Lathom, 1st Earl of Lathom. In the Spring of 1067 A.D. Born: Abt.1031, In what was then Saxon, England.

Married Lady Marigard de Essex of Essex & Avon on 28 May 1068, Chapelry of Latho …

zh.lifeSummary: Dunnick FitzUghtred , 1st Earl of Lathom, de Singleton是Uchtred Fitz Gospatrick的兒子，於1031年出生在英國藍卡爾吉可哈姆。他於1068年5月28日與Marigard Godwinesdatter在英國艾可結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1092年10月12日在他的家鄉享年61歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭藍卡爾拉堂姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Dunnick FitzUghtred , 1st Earl of Lathom, de Singleton是Uchtred Fitz Gospatrick的儿子，于1031年出生在英国藍卡爾吉可哈姆。他于1068年5月28日与Marigard Godwinesdatter在英国艾可结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1092年10月12日在他的家乡享年61岁，埋葬在英国英格兰藍卡爾拉堂姆。

nameMeanings.name: Dunnick
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Dunnock, a nickname from OldEnglish dunnoc ‘hedge sparrow’.

historicEvents.title: England Divided
historicEvents.description: King Canute died in 1035 and England was divided between his three sons. His son Sweyn received Norway, Harthacanute received Denmark, and Harold Harefoot received North England.

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

en.lifeSummary: Dunnick FitzUghtred , 1st Earl of Lathom, de Singleton was born in 1031, in Kirkham, Lancashire, England as the son of Uchtred Fitz Gospatrick. He married Marigard Godwinesdatter on 28 May 1068, in Essex, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 12 October 1092, in his hometown, at the age of 61, and was buried in Lathom, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Dunnick FitzUghtred , 1st Earl of Lathom, de Singleton est né en 1031, à Kirkham, Lancashire, Angleterre, fils de Uchtred Fitz Gospatrick. Il a épousé Marigard Godwinesdatter le 28 mai 1068, à Essex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 12 octobre 1092, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterré à Lathom, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Dunnick FitzUghtred , 1st Earl of Lathom, de Singleton wurde 1031 in Kirkham, Lancashire, England, als Sohn von Uchtred Fitz Gospatrick geboren. Er hat am 28. Mai 1068 in Essex, England Marigard Godwinesdatter geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 12. Oktober 1092 im Alter von 61 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Lathom, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Dunnick FitzUghtred , 1st Earl of Lathom, de Singleton è nato il nel 1031 nel Kirkham, Lancashire, England come figlio di Uchtred Fitz Gospatrick. Lui sposato Marigard Godwinesdatter il 28 maggio 1068, nel Essex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 12 ottobre 1092, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 61 anni, e fu sepolto a Lathom, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Dunnick FitzUghtred , 1st Earl of Lathom, de Singletonは1031年にイギリスランカシュアイアキルクハムでUchtred Fitz Gospatrickの息子として生まれた。1068年5月28日にイギリスエセックスでMarigard Godwinesdatterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1092年10月12日に故郷で61歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスランカシュアイアラソムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Dunnick FitzUghtred , 1st Earl of Lathom, de Singleton(은)는 1031년 영국 랭카실르 커카에서 Uchtred Fitz Gospatrick의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1068년 5월 28일 영국 에세스에서 Marigard Godwinesdatter(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1092년 10월 12일 그의 고향에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 래톰에 묻혔다.

mn.Lathom, Lancashire, England, United King: Lathom, Lancashire, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Dunnick FitzUghtred , 1st Earl of Lathom, de Singleton nasceu em 1031, em Kirkham, Lancashire, Inglaterra filho de Uchtred Fitz Gospatrick. Ele casou-se com Marigard Godwinesdatter em 28 de maio de 1068, em Essex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 12 de outubro de 1092, em sua cidade natal, com 61 anos, e foi sepultado em Lathom, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Dunnick FitzUghtred , 1st Earl of Lathom, de Singleton родился в 1031 г. в местности кирхам, ланкашир, Англия. Его отца звали Uchtred Fitz Gospatrick. Он женился на женщине по имени Marigard Godwinesdatter 28 мая 1068 г. в местности эссекс, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 12 октября 1092 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 61 год и был похоронен в местности латом, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Dunnick FitzUghtred , 1st Earl of Lathom, de Singleton nació en 1031, en Kirkham, Lancashire, Inglaterra como hijo de Uchtred Fitz Gospatrick. Se casó con Marigard Godwinesdatter el 28 de mayo de 1068, en Essex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 12 de octubre de 1092, en su pueblo, a la edad de 61 años, y fue sepultado en Lathom, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
